message:
fix(connection): USING join index resolution correctness, API renames, trait stubs, rustfmt

USING join correctness fix (connection.rs):
- Extract eval_using_constraint_indices() helper from inline USING join
  match arm — the old code used unwrap_or(0) on column index lookup
  failure, silently using column 0 instead of falling back to the slow
  eval_using_constraint path. New code uses let-else with proper
  complete=false break, routing through the correct fallback when
  column resolution fails
- Remove erroneous blank line inside INSERT...SELECT for loop
- Fix over-indentation of for partition_indices loop

PageWriter trait compliance (balance.rs, cursor.rs, vectorized_scan.rs):
- Add record_write_witness() stub to all test MockPageWriter impls
  to satisfy the new required trait method added in the previous commit

API tracking (e2e_bench.rs, write_throughput_bench.rs):
- Rename execute_params → execute_with_params across benchmark call
  sites to match renamed method in core crate

Minor improvements:
- lib.rs: Add pub use fsqlite_types::SqliteValue re-export from root
- wal_adapter.rs: Shorten SyncFlags::NORMAL path (import already exists)
- wal_fec.rs: Fix &mut→& receiver consistency in drain_abandoned_work
  calls (4 sites) to match updated function signature
- arc_cache.rs: Enhanced Debug impl with shards_len/shard_mask fields,
  finish_non_exhaustive(); #[allow(dead_code)] on t1_mru_key helper;
  page() test helper returns CachedPage instead of Arc<CachedPage>;
  test rename to test_arc_scan_then_hotset_acceptance
- engine.rs: Simplify nested if to if-and; #[allow(dead_code)] on
  last_position_stamp field
- glossary.rs: Remove trailing blank line
- comprehensive_bench.rs: rustfmt reformatting of long lines

Rustfmt pass across MVCC, VDBE, VFS crates:
- begin_concurrent.rs, hot_witness_index.rs, shared_lock_table.rs,
  witness_hierarchy.rs, witness_plane.rs, vectorized_dispatch.rs,
  shm.rs: pure formatting changes with no semantic modifications

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
